LanguageData.LBD_Angry_Bluefire_Switch.label: Red Heat
LanguageData.LBD_Angry_Bluefire_Switch.description: Feeling annoyed by the inability to quickly eliminate pests, Miraboreasu unleashes her most terrifying destructive power. In this state, her melee and fire-breathing abilities are greatly enhanced, but her mood will drop for a period of time.
LanguageData.LBD_SustainedFlameCone.label: Fan-shaped Dragonfire
LanguageData.LBD_SustainedFlameCone.description: After a brief charge, Miraboreasu continuously breathes dragonfire in a fan-shaped area ahead. The dragonfire she breathes is formed by unnatural power, turning both flesh and steel to ash under her wrath.\n\nIf entering the True Power state, the fire turns blue-purple, with significantly increased damage and armor penetration.
LanguageData.LBD_SustainedFlameAura.label: Circular Dragonfire
LanguageData.LBD_SustainedFlameAura.description: After a brief charge, Miraboreasu breathes dragonfire onto the ground, which is reflected and burns everything around. The dragonfire she breathes is formed by unnatural power, turning both flesh and steel to ash under her wrath.\n\nIf entering the True Power state, the fire turns blue-purple, with significantly increased damage and armor penetration.
LanguageData.LBD_FireBall.label: Fireball Spit
LanguageData.LBD_FireBall.description: Miraboreasu spits fireballs at the target location, which explode on impact and cause area damage.\n\nIf entering the True Power state, the fireballs turn blue-purple. Accuracy decreases but three fireballs are spit at once, with significantly increased damage and armor penetration.
LanguageData.LBD_FireBall_Proj.label: fireball
LanguageData.LBD_FireBall_Blue_Proj.label: fireball
